message:
The other day, I was rummaging through my closet when I stumbled upon my old go-bag. You know, the one I packed with the best of intentions during a particularly dramatic episode of a disaster show? I opened it up, and instead of the essentials, I found a half-eaten granola bar, an expired can of beans, and a collection of mismatched socks. 😂

It was a classic case of preparedness gone hilariously wrong! Lesson learned: it’s not just about having a go-bag, but actually keeping it stocked with useful stuff. So, I decided it was time for a little refresh and got to work on a more functional kit. Sometimes, the comedy of not being ready gives us the best motivation to get things in order.

Have you ever had a moment like that? What’s the most unexpected thing you’ve found in your emergency supplies?
